channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Apalachee High School shooting suspect to change plea, court documents reveal
item.description: Colt Gray is scheduled for a plea hearing in Barrow County Superior Court on July 24, according to court records.

item.title: Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner officially exits race
item.description: Graham Platner formally withdrew from the Maine Senate race on Friday.

item.title: Iran live updates: Khamenei vows retaliation for his father's death
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, involving large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: WATCH: Comedian Jeff Arcuri on his new Netflix special and crowd work
item.description: ABC News' Linsey Davis spoke with comedian Jeff Arcuri about his new Netflix stand-up special, his rise on TikTok, and his skill at working with audiences.
